summary: Frontend testing completed for Comprehensive Report Tab feature. All 4 test cases passed: 1) التقرير الشامل tab exists as FIRST tab in Reports page 2) Tab displays summary cards for المبيعات, المشتريات, المصاريف, الآجل, الإرجاعات, صافي الربح 3) طباعة التقرير and تحديث الكل buttons exist 4) Detail cards display correct data structure
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive Report Tab feature verified working. Tab is first in Reports page with green styling. Contains 6 summary cards (Sales, Purchases, Expenses, Credit, Refunds, Net Profit) and 6 detail cards. Print and Refresh buttons functional.

comprehensive_report_tab_position.description: التقرير الشامل is the FIRST tab in Reports page tabs list

summary_cards.description: 6 colored summary cards displayed at top

cards_found: المبيعات - shows total, cash, card, credit, order count
المشتريات - shows total, paid, remaining, invoice count
المصاريف - shows total, categories, transaction count
الآجل - shows total, paid, remaining, accounts count
شركات التوصيل - shows sales, commissions, net, order count
الإلغاءات والخصومات - shows cancellations, discounts, refunds

net_profit_section.description: صافي الربح الحقيقي section at bottom
verified: Shows 'بعد خصم جميع التكاليف والمصاريف' subtitle

code_review_notes.Reports.js: Lines 54-273: ComprehensiveReportTab component properly receives all report data props. Lines 628-664: Tab is correctly positioned as first tab with green styling.
